sessions.summary: CHUB bot: pushback handling + sweep fix + presentation + re-review with AI dedup
achievements: Built team presentation (8 slides, HTML, developer-agency framing)
Council-approved design: acknowledge pushback, no AI counter-arguments, learn at merge
Implemented full re-review with AI deduplication on new commits
Fixed 422 error with parseDiffLines + file-level fallback
Planned Slack poll promotion + webhook auto-review as post-k8s features
blockers: Slack Socket Mode pong timeouts on SAP VPN — needs k8s with stable network
